title: dendrobium lamellatum
intro: Dendrobium lamellatum, also known as the wavy dendrobium or wavy orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to Australia and New Guinea. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dendrobium lamellatum include its potential to lower cholesterol, reduce blood pressure, and improve immune function, as well as its role in treating various diseases such as cancer, diabetes, and cardiovascular disease. Dendrobium lamellatum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and infusions, which are made by extracting the plant's active compounds through methods such as decoction, infusion, or percolation.
